plugins.cameraPermissionText: MobileClaw needs camera access to show your AI agent what you see.
plugins.enableMicrophonePermissionText: MobileClaw needs microphone access to hear you.

infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: MobileClaw uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MobileClaw uses the microphone to capture your voice.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MobileClaw needs camera access to show your AI agent what you see.
